title: Hi! I'm Fabiola Suárez
subtitle: Full Stack Developer
project_ecommerce_description: Full e-commerce interface with product listing, cart and checkout flow built with React.
project_budget_description: Budget management app with CRUD operations and state management.
project_invitationCreator_description: App for creating and managing customized invitations.
contact_subtitle: Thanks for making it this far!
contact_text_1: I'm motivated by innovative, creative projects with real impact. If you have an idea where you think I could contribute, an opportunity where I could be part of the team, or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out.
phrase_03: It's not difficult, it's just new
phrase_04: If you weren't ready, you wouldn't have the opportunity
phrase_05: You don't need more motivation; you need better habits
phrase_06: There are many first times still ahead
phrase_07: If you're going to dream, dream big
phrase_08: It's a privilege to be here and now
phrase_10: Res, non verba: actions, not words
